blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 46°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
